case_title: FADHEL, HIZAM ALI VS FADEL, ALI MOHAMED

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,875.00 FILED BY FADHEL, HIZAM ALI AS TO DEFENDANT FADEL, ALI MOHAMED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FADHEL, HIZAM ALI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FADEL, ALI MOHAMED CONTINUED FROM 10/27/00 FOR PLAINTIFF TO BRING TO BRING TRANSLATOR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FADEL, ALI MOHAMED
REM: MATTER IS PUT OVER TO MON. 10-30-00 @ 3:30 PM PER PLTF'S REQUEST TO BRING INTERPRETER.
